package rulefixtures

// scenario for stable_value_normalization_in_inner_loop: Stable value normalization (ToLower, TrimSpace, etc.) repeated inside inner loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule366NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario366Negative(records []Rule366NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
